product_description: ReadWorks is a nonprofit organization that offers free, high-quality reading comprehension content and tools for K-12 students and teachers. Its mission is to support the growth of successful, joyful readers through research-based resources and digital supports.

vendor_resources.text: Scaffolding Made Easy: 7+ Tools and Resources to Adapt ReadWorks for Special Education
vendor_resources.justification: This blog post from ReadWorks describes various student-facing features and tools designed to support students with visual impairments, dyslexia, and other disabilities, including adjustable font size, focus tools, and text-to-speech.
This blog post highlights student tools such as distraction-free mode, text magnification, split screen, guided reading strip, and text-to-speech, which enhance accessibility.
This is the official accessibility statement page for ReadWorks.org, detailing adherence to WCAG 2.1 Level AA and outlining known issues and features.

acr_reports.title: Accessibility Conformance Report (ACR) (linked from Accessibility Statement)
